name: Critical illness rider vs standalone CI plan
description: User asks whether to add CI rider to term plan or buy standalone CI policy

input.message: My term insurance company is offering a critical illness rider for ₹5,000 extra per year covering ₹20 lakhs for 20 critical illnesses. Should I take this or buy a separate critical illness plan? My budget is tight.

notes: Rider: cheaper, covers only if policy in force, may reduce death benefit. Standalone: more illnesses covered (40-60), independent of life cover, continues even if term plan lapses. For tight budget, rider is OK as starting point. Should note 20 CIs may be less than standalone 40+ CIs.
